title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 135.973 - Eligibility of existing enterprise zones
text:
135.973.  Eligibility of existing enterprise zones. — After January 1, 2007, all enterprise zones designated before January 1, 2006, shall be eligible to receive the tax benefits under sections 135.950 to 135.970.
(L. 2004 S.B. 1155 § 135.1078)
